description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a deep blue exterior and a black cap featuring a loop handle, likely for easy carrying or attachment. The bottle appears to be made of metal, possibly stainless steel, with a matte or slightly grippy finish. A white logo or branding mark is visible on the front, adding a distinct visual element. The cap is a screw type with a flip-up spout, commonly found on reusable water bottles. The bottle sits on a flat, light-colored surface, and there are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear. The overall design suggests it is intended for personal hydration and portability in urban environments.
description: A tall, blue metal bottle with a black looped screw cap and a white logo on the front, designed for personal hydration. The surface is matte and the bottle appears sturdy and portable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black cap with loop handle and the bottle's blue body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white logo and the full cylindrical shape of the bottle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cap and handle visible, no logo present.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain blue back of the bottle and the cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: A white logo is visible on the front of the bottle, centrally placed and clearly printed.
